allow: Bash(mv skyline-*.jpg workspace-*.jpg stadium-*.jpg stars-*.jpg arch-*.jpg dawn-*.jpg "C:\\Users\\kartu\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\D--My-Work-Projects-Portfolio-Website\\9ee7e834-3d46-48ac-aa52-1a8de1584363\\scratchpad\\vet\\" && curl -sL "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1550779864-6ccb28702fdb?w=640)
